summaryEn: Stack Strength to make every Attack card deal massive damage. The Ironclad signature build that turns basic Strikes into devastating blows.
summaryZh: 叠加力量使每张攻击牌造成巨大伤害。铁甲战士的标志性卡组，将基础打击变为毁灭性打击。
coreMechanicEn: Strength adds flat damage to EVERY Attack card played. With 10 Strength, a Strike deals 16 instead of 6, and multi-hit cards like Sword Boomerang (3x5) become 3x15=45 damage. Demon Form gives +3 Strength per turn permanently, creating exponential scaling.
coreMechanicZh: 力量为每张打出的攻击牌增加固定伤害。有10点力量时，打击造成16而非6伤害，多段攻击如回旋飞剑（3x5）变为3x15=45伤害。恶魔形态每回合永久+3力量，创造指数级成长。
strategyEn:
Play Demon Form or Inflame early to start stacking Strength.
Use multi-hit Attacks for maximum Strength scaling.
Heavy Blade deals 14 + 5x Strength for massive single hits.
Limit Break doubles your current Strength.
Defend with Flame Barrier and Impervious.
strategyZh:
尽早打出恶魔形态或燃烧来开始叠加力量。
使用多段攻击最大化力量成长。
重剑造成14+5x力量的巨大单次伤害。
极限突破将当前力量翻倍。
用火焰屏障和坚不可摧防御。
strengthsEn:
Simple and effective gameplan
Scales infinitely with Demon Form
Multi-hit attacks multiply Strength bonus
Heavy Blade can one-shot most enemies
Works with many Ironclad relics
strengthsZh:
简单有效的游戏计划
恶魔形态无限成长
多段攻击倍增力量加成
重剑可以秒杀大多数敌人
与许多铁甲战士遗物配合良好
weaknessesEn:
Demon Form costs 3 Energy and does nothing the turn played
Needs time to scale up
Vulnerable to Strength-reducing debuffs
Limited AoE options
weaknessesZh:
恶魔形态消耗3能量且打出回合无作用
需要时间成长
对降低力量的减益效果脆弱
群伤选择有限
keyRelicsEn:
Vajra: Start with +1 Strength
Bag of Marbles: Enemies start Vulnerable
Paper Krane: Weak enemies deal 40% less
Mark of Pain: +1 Energy but 2 Wounds
keyRelicsZh:
金刚杵：开局+1力量
弹珠袋：敌人开局易伤
纸鹤：虚弱敌人伤害降低40%
苦痛印记：+1能量但2张伤口
tipsEn:
Demon Form is the #1 priority — take it every time
Limit Break is insane with Demon Form (doubles all that Strength)
Heavy Blade scales 5x with Strength — best single-target finisher
Sword Boomerang and Twin Strike multiply Strength
Don not skip Block cards — you need to survive while scaling
tipsZh:
恶魔形态是第一优先级——每次都拿
极限突破配合恶魔形态非常强（翻倍所有力量）
重剑力量5倍成长——最佳单体终结技
回旋飞剑和双重打击倍增力量
不要跳过格挡卡——你需要在成长时存活

summaryEn: Generate and play massive amounts of Shivs (0-cost 4-damage Attacks) each turn. Combined with Accuracy (+4 damage per Shiv) and Kunai/Shuriken relics, each Shiv becomes a devastating strike.
summaryZh: 每回合生成并打出大量飞刀（0费4伤害攻击）。配合精准（每把飞刀+4伤害）和苦无/手里剑遗物，每把飞刀都变成毁灭性打击。
coreMechanicEn: Shivs are 0-cost Attack cards that deal 4 damage and Exhaust after use. Blade Dance creates 3 Shivs, Cloak and Dagger creates 1 Shiv + Block. Accuracy is a Power that gives ALL Shivs +4 damage permanently. With 2 Accuracy, each Shiv deals 12 damage for 0 Energy.
coreMechanicZh: 飞刀是0费攻击卡，造成4伤害并在使用后消耗。刀刃之舞创建3把飞刀，斗篷与匕首创建1把飞刀+格挡。精准是一张能力卡，永久给所有飞刀+4伤害。有2张精准时，每把飞刀0能量造成12伤害。
strategyEn:
Play Accuracy as early as possible for Shiv damage scaling.
Blade Dance and Cloak and Dagger are your main Shiv generators.
Infinite Blades gives 1 free Shiv per turn.
Storm of Steel converts entire hand to Shivs.
After Image gives 1 Block per card played — insane with Shivs.
strategyZh:
尽早打出精准来提升飞刀伤害。
刀刃之舞和斗篷与匕首是主要飞刀生成器。
无尽之刃每回合给1把免费飞刀。
钢铁风暴将整手牌转化为飞刀。
残影每打出一张牌获得1格挡——配合飞刀极强。
strengthsEn:
All damage costs 0 Energy — play as many as you draw
Accuracy makes each Shiv hit hard
Excellent with Kunai (+1 Dex per 3 Attacks) and Shuriken (+1 Str per 3 Attacks)
After Image provides massive passive Block
Simple and consistent gameplan
strengthsZh:
所有伤害消耗0能量——抽到多少打多少
精准让每把飞刀打得很痛
与苦无（每3张攻击+1敏捷）和手里剑（每3张攻击+1力量）配合出色
残影提供大量被动格挡
简单稳定的游戏计划
weaknessesEn:
Each Shiv Exhausts — need constant generation
Without Accuracy, Shivs deal low damage
Vulnerable to Time Eater (counts card plays)
Needs Shiv generators to function
weaknessesZh:
每把飞刀使用后消耗——需要持续生成
没有精准时飞刀伤害低
对时间吞噬者脆弱（计算打牌次数）
需要飞刀生成器才能运作
keyRelicsEn:
Kunai: Every 3 Attacks played, gain 1 Dexterity
Shuriken: Every 3 Attacks played, gain 1 Strength
After Image: Gain 1 Block per card played
Ninja Scroll: Start combat with 3 Shivs
keyRelicsZh:
苦无：每打出3张攻击，获得1敏捷
手里剑：每打出3张攻击，获得1力量
残影：每打出一张牌获得1格挡
忍者卷轴：战斗开始时有3把飞刀
tipsEn:
Accuracy is the #1 priority — each copy adds +4 to ALL Shivs
Blade Dance is the best Shiv generator (3 Shivs for 1 Energy)
After Image + many Shivs = massive passive Block
Watch out for Time Eater — he punishes playing many cards
Storm of Steel is a great finisher but removes your hand
tipsZh:
精准是第一优先级——每张给所有飞刀+4
刀刃之舞是最好的飞刀生成器（1能量3把飞刀）
残影+大量飞刀=大量被动格挡
小心时间吞噬者——他惩罚打出多张牌
钢铁风暴是很好的终结技但会移除你的手牌

summaryEn: Claw costs 0 Energy and increases ALL Claw damage by 2 each time it is played. Combined with 0-cost card synergies and card draw, this creates an unstoppable damage engine.
summaryZh: 利爪消耗0能量，每次打出时所有利爪伤害增加2。配合0费卡协同和抽牌，创造不可阻挡的伤害引擎。
coreMechanicEn: Claw is a 0-cost Attack that deals 3 damage. Every time ANY Claw is played, ALL Claws permanently gain +2 damage for the rest of combat. This means your 3rd Claw play deals 7, your 5th deals 11, etc. All for One retrieves ALL 0-cost cards from discard, letting you replay Claws repeatedly.
coreMechanicZh: 利爪是0费攻击，造成3伤害。每次打出任何利爪，所有利爪在本场战斗中永久+2伤害。这意味着第3次打出利爪造成7伤害，第5次造成11伤害。全力以赴从弃牌堆取回所有0费卡，让你反复打出利爪。
strategyEn:
Collect multiple copies of Claw.
Add 0-cost support cards: Beam Cell, Go For The Eyes.
All for One is your key combo piece — retrieves all 0-cost cards.
Scrape and FTL for card draw.
Does NOT use Orbs — avoid Orb cards.
strategyZh:
收集多张利爪。
加入0费辅助卡：光束细胞、攻其不备。
全力以赴是你的关键combo组件——取回所有0费卡。
刮擦和超光速用于抽牌。
不使用充能球——避免充能球卡牌。
strengthsEn:
All damage costs 0 Energy
Scales infinitely — Claws get stronger every play
All for One creates repeatable combo loops
Simple gameplan: play Claws, draw more, repeat
Does not rely on Orbs at all
strengthsZh:
所有伤害消耗0能量
无限成长——利爪每次打出都变强
全力以赴创造可重复的combo循环
简单计划：打利爪，抽更多，重复
完全不依赖充能球
weaknessesEn:
Needs multiple Claw copies to work
Weak early before Claws scale
No inherent defense — need separate Block cards
All for One costs 2 Energy
weaknessesZh:
需要多张利爪副本才能运作
利爪成长前前期较弱
没有内在防御——需要单独的格挡卡
全力以赴消耗2能量
keyRelicsEn:
Nuclear Battery: Start with extra Energy
Kunai/Shuriken: Bonus from playing many Attacks
Nunchaku: 1 Energy for every 10 Attacks played
Ornamental Fan: Playing 3 Attacks grants Block
keyRelicsZh:
核能电池：开局额外能量
苦无/手里剑：打出多张攻击的奖励
双节棍：每打出10张攻击获得1能量
装饰扇：打出3张攻击获得格挡
tipsEn:
Take EVERY Claw offered — more copies = faster scaling
All for One is the #1 priority after Claws
Avoid Orb-generating cards — they do not help this build
Scrape draws cards but discards non-0-cost cards — build around it
Hologram and Seek help find Claws and All for One
tipsZh:
每次遇到利爪都要拿——更多副本=更快成长
全力以赴是利爪之后的第一优先级
避免产生充能球的卡——它们对这个卡组没帮助
刮擦抽牌但弃掉非0费卡——围绕它构建
全息图和搜索帮助找到利爪和全力以赴

summaryEn: Stack Doom on enemies until it reaches their current HP, instantly executing them. The Necrobinder signature mechanic that bypasses traditional damage entirely.
summaryZh: 在敌人身上叠加末日直到达到其当前生命值，立即处刑。缚灵者的标志性机制，完全绕过传统伤害。
coreMechanicEn: Doom is a unique debuff: when an enemy Doom stacks equal or exceed their CURRENT HP, they are instantly killed regardless of Block or other defenses. This means you do not need to deal damage at all — just stack Doom fast enough. Combined with damage to lower their HP, you can execute enemies much faster.
coreMechanicZh: 末日是独特的减益效果：当敌人的末日层数等于或超过其当前生命值时，无论格挡或其他防御如何，它们都会被立即杀死。这意味着你根本不需要造成伤害——只需足够快地叠加末日。配合伤害降低其生命值，你可以更快地处刑敌人。
strategyEn:
Apply Doom with Scourge, Doom Spike, and other Doom cards.
Deal damage to lower enemy HP closer to Doom threshold.
Oblivion is your finisher for high-HP targets.
Use Osty as a damage supplement and shield.
Prioritize Doom applicators in Act 1.
strategyZh:
用天罚、末日尖刺等末日卡施加末日。
造成伤害降低敌人生命值接近末日阈值。
湮灭是你对高血量目标的终结技。
使用Osty作为伤害补充和护盾。
在第一幕优先选择末日施加器。
strengthsEn:
Can instantly kill ANY enemy regardless of max HP
Bypasses Block and damage reduction
S-tier character in current meta
Unique mechanic with no counterplay from enemies
Works against bosses with massive HP pools
strengthsZh:
可以立即杀死任何敌人，无论最大生命值
绕过格挡和伤害减免
当前版本S级角色
独特机制，敌人无法反制
对拥有大量生命池的Boss有效
weaknessesEn:
Necrobinder has lowest HP in the game
Osty starts at 1 HP each combat
Some spells cost HP (Soul cost)
Needs careful health management
Can struggle if Doom cards do not show up early
weaknessesZh:
缚灵者拥有游戏中最低的生命值
Osty每场战斗从1生命开始
部分法术消耗生命值（灵魂消耗）
需要谨慎的生命值管理
如果末日卡不早出现会比较挣扎
keyRelicsEn:
Any relic that provides passive Block or healing
Relics that reduce Soul costs
Relics that buff Osty
Burning Blood equivalent for sustain
keyRelicsZh:
任何提供被动格挡或治疗的遗物
减少灵魂消耗的遗物
增强Osty的遗物
类似燃烧之血的续航遗物
tipsEn:
Doom + damage = faster execution (lower HP = lower threshold)
Keep a few direct damage cards even in pure Doom build
Buff Osty early — he absorbs attacks while you stack Doom
Some Soul costs can be reduced to 0
Necrobinder is considered S-tier in current Early Access
tipsZh:
末日+伤害=更快处刑（更低生命值=更低阈值）
即使纯末日卡组也保留几张直接伤害卡
尽早增强Osty——他在你叠加末日时吸收攻击
部分法术的灵魂消耗可以降为0
缚灵者在当前抢先体验版本中被认为是S级

summaryEn: Generate and spend Stars as a unique resource to fuel powerful abilities. The Regent signature mechanic with excellent AoE, scaling, and versatility.
summaryZh: 生成并消耗星辰作为独特资源来驱动强力技能。摄政王的标志性机制，拥有出色的群伤、成长性和多功能性。
coreMechanicEn: Stars are the Regent unique resource — you start each fight with 3 Stars. Star Generator cards create more Stars, while Star Spender cards consume Stars for powerful effects. The key is building an engine that generates more Stars than you spend, then using finishers like Decisions Decisions to chain massive combos.
coreMechanicZh: 星辰是摄政王的独特资源——每场战斗开始时有3颗星辰。星辰生成卡创造更多星辰，星辰消耗卡消耗星辰产生强力效果。关键是建立一个生成星辰多于消耗的引擎，然后使用抉择等终结技连锁大量combo。
strategyEn:
Phase 1: Pick Star generators (Gather Light, Glow, Hidden Cache).
Phase 2: Add Star spenders (Astral Pulse, Comet, Genesis).
Phase 3: Find finishers (Decisions Decisions, Royal Gamble, The Smith).
Key Combo: Decisions Decisions chains into itself for infinite Stars.
Balance generators and spenders — too many of either breaks the engine.
strategyZh:
阶段1：选择星辰生成器（聚光、辉光、隐藏宝藏）。
阶段2：加入星辰消耗器（星芒脉冲、彗星、创世纪）。
阶段3：找到终结技（抉择、皇家赌局、铸匠）。
关键combo：抉择可以连锁自身实现无限星辰。
平衡生成器和消耗器——任一过多都会破坏引擎。
strengthsEn:
Excellent AoE damage with Star spenders
Strong scaling through Star engine
Very versatile — can adapt to any situation
Decisions Decisions creates infinite combo potential
Good mix of offense and defense
strengthsZh:
星辰消耗器提供出色的群伤
通过星辰引擎实现强力成长
非常多功能——可以适应任何情况
抉择创造无限combo潜力
攻防兼备
weaknessesEn:
Complex resource management
Needs balance between generators and spenders
Can brick if Stars run out at wrong time
Some Star cards are situational
weaknessesZh:
复杂的资源管理
需要平衡生成器和消耗器
如果星辰在错误时机耗尽会卡手
部分星辰卡是情境性的
keyRelicsEn:
Relics that provide extra Stars or Star generation
Energy relics to play more cards per turn
Card draw relics for consistency
keyRelicsZh:
提供额外星辰或星辰生成的遗物
能量遗物用于每回合打出更多牌
抽牌遗物提高稳定性
tipsEn:
Decisions Decisions + Royal Gamble + The Smith = infinite Stars engine
Reflect is S-tier — always take it
Bombardment and Big Bang are top AoE cards
Void Form and Meteor Shower are S-tier Powers
Balance your deck: aim for 40% generators, 40% spenders, 20% utility
tipsZh:
抉择+皇家赌局+铸匠=无限星辰引擎
反射是S级——遇到必拿
轰炸和大爆炸是顶级群伤卡
虚空形态和流星雨是S级能力卡
平衡牌组：目标40%生成器、40%消耗器、20%工具

summaryEn: Exhaust cards from your deck to trigger powerful synergies. Feel No Pain generates Block, Dark Embrace draws cards, and Barricade lets Block stack infinitely.
summaryZh: 消耗牌组中的卡牌触发强力协同。无痛生成格挡，黑暗拥抱抽牌，壁垒让格挡无限叠加。
coreMechanicEn: Exhausting a card removes it from combat permanently. Feel No Pain gives 3 Block per exhaust, Dark Embrace draws 1 card per exhaust. Combined with Barricade (Block carries over between turns), you build an impenetrable defense while thinning your deck to only the best cards.
coreMechanicZh: 消耗一张卡将其从战斗中永久移除。无痛每次消耗给3格挡，黑暗拥抱每次消耗抽1牌。配合壁垒（格挡在回合间保留），你在精简牌组到只剩最好的卡的同时建立坚不可摧的防御。
strategyEn:
Set up Feel No Pain and Dark Embrace early.
Exhaust Strikes and weak cards to thin your deck.
Barricade lets Block stack — become invincible.
True Grit and Fiend Fire are key exhaust enablers.
Corruption makes all Skills cost 0 but Exhausts them.
strategyZh:
尽早铺垫无痛和黑暗拥抱。
消耗打击和弱卡来精简牌组。
壁垒让格挡叠加——变得无敌。
真正勇气和恶魔之火是关键消耗触发器。
堕落让所有技能消耗0但会消耗它们。
strengthsEn:
Incredibly strong defense with Barricade
Deck thinning makes draws more consistent
Feel No Pain generates massive Block
Corruption turns all Skills into free plays
Almost impossible to die once set up
strengthsZh:
壁垒提供极强防御
精简牌组让抽牌更稳定
无痛生成大量格挡
堕落让所有技能免费打出
铺垫完成后几乎不可能死亡
weaknessesEn:
Needs multiple setup pieces
Corruption can exhaust too many cards if not careful
Slow to get going in Act 1
Requires specific card combinations
weaknessesZh:
需要多个铺垫组件
堕落如果不小心会消耗太多卡
第一幕启动较慢
需要特定卡牌组合
keyRelicsEn:
Dead Branch: Create random card when Exhaust (insane with Corruption)
Charon Ashes: Exhausted cards return to hand
Strange Spoon: 50% chance Exhausted cards are not Exhausted
keyRelicsZh:
枯枝：消耗时创建随机卡（配合堕落极强）
冥河灰烬：消耗的卡回到手牌
奇异汤匙：50%概率消耗的卡不被消耗
tipsEn:
Dead Branch + Corruption = infinite free cards (S-tier combo)
Feel No Pain is the #1 priority for this build
Do not play Corruption without Feel No Pain or Dark Embrace
True Grit exhausts a card AND gives Block — perfect for this build
Second Wind exhausts all non-Attack cards for Block
tipsZh:
枯枝+堕落=无限免费卡（S级combo）
无痛是这个卡组的第一优先级
没有无痛或黑暗拥抱不要打堕落
真正勇气消耗一张卡并给格挡——完美适合这个卡组
二次呼吸消耗所有非攻击卡获得格挡

summaryEn: Stack Poison on enemies to deal increasing damage each turn. Catalyst triples Poison stacks, Corpse Explosion spreads Poison damage on death, and Noxious Fumes applies Poison passively.
summaryZh: 在敌人身上叠加中毒每回合造成递增伤害。催化剂三倍中毒层数，尸体爆炸在死亡时扩散中毒伤害，毒雾被动施加中毒。
coreMechanicEn: Poison deals damage equal to its stacks at the end of each turn, then decreases by 1. So 10 Poison deals 10+9+8+...+1 = 55 total damage over time. Catalyst TRIPLES current Poison — 10 becomes 30 (465 total damage). Burst plays the next Skill twice, so Burst + Catalyst = 9x Poison.
coreMechanicZh: 中毒在每回合结束时造成等于层数的伤害，然后减少1。所以10中毒总共造成10+9+8+...+1=55伤害。催化剂将当前中毒三倍——10变30（总共465伤害）。爆裂让下一张技能打出两次，所以爆裂+催化剂=9倍中毒。
strategyEn:
Apply Poison with Deadly Poison, Noxious Fumes, Poisoned Stab.
Stack Poison to 10+ then use Catalyst to triple it.
Burst + Catalyst = 9x Poison (instant kill on most enemies).
Corpse Explosion spreads Poison damage as AoE.
Defend with Dodge and Roll, Blur, and Leg Sweep.
strategyZh:
用致命毒药、毒雾、淬毒打击施加中毒。
叠加中毒到10+然后用催化剂三倍化。
爆裂+催化剂=9倍中毒（秒杀大多数敌人）。
尸体爆炸将中毒伤害扩散为群伤。
用闪避翻滚、模糊、扫堂腿防御。
strengthsEn:
Poison scales exponentially with Catalyst
Burst + Catalyst is one of the strongest combos in the game
Corpse Explosion provides excellent AoE
Noxious Fumes applies Poison passively every turn
Does not need to attack — pure debuff strategy
strengthsZh:
中毒通过催化剂指数级成长
爆裂+催化剂是游戏中最强combo之一
尸体爆炸提供出色群伤
毒雾每回合被动施加中毒
不需要攻击——纯减益策略
weaknessesEn:
Poison takes time to kill — not instant damage
Artifact blocks Poison application
Some enemies cleanse debuffs
Needs Catalyst to deal with high-HP enemies
weaknessesZh:
中毒需要时间击杀——不是即时伤害
神器阻止中毒施加
部分敌人清除减益
需要催化剂对付高血量敌人
keyRelicsEn:
Snecko Skull: +1 Poison per Poison card played
TwistedFunnel: Apply 2 Poison to all at combat start
The Specimen: When Poisoned enemy dies, transfer Poison
Sadistic Nature: Deal 5 damage when applying debuff
keyRelicsZh:
蛇骨：每打出一张中毒卡+1中毒
扭曲漏斗：战斗开始时对所有敌人施加2中毒
标本：中毒敌人死亡时转移中毒
虐待狂本性：施加减益时造成5伤害
tipsEn:
Catalyst is the #1 priority — triples ALL Poison on target
Burst + Catalyst = play Catalyst twice = 9x Poison
Noxious Fumes is amazing — passive Poison every turn
Corpse Explosion + Poison = AoE clear when first enemy dies
Envenom adds Poison on unblocked damage — passive stacking
tipsZh:
催化剂是第一优先级——三倍目标上的所有中毒
爆裂+催化剂=打出催化剂两次=9倍中毒
毒雾非常强——每回合被动中毒
尸体爆炸+中毒=第一个敌人死亡时群伤清场
侵蚀在未格挡伤害时施加中毒——被动叠加

summaryEn: Fill Orb slots with Frost Orbs and stack Focus to generate massive passive Block every turn. The safest and most defensive Defect archetype.
summaryZh: 用冰霜充能球填满充能球槽位并叠加专注来每回合生成大量被动格挡。最安全、最防御性的故障机器人卡组原型。
coreMechanicEn: Frost Orbs generate Block equal to (2 + Focus) at the end of each turn passively. With 3 Frost Orbs and 5 Focus, you gain 21 Block per turn without playing any cards. Defragment (+1 Focus) and Inserter (+1 Orb slot) are the key scaling tools.
coreMechanicZh: 冰霜充能球在每回合结束时被动生成等于（2+专注）的格挡。有3个冰霜充能球和5点专注时，你每回合不打任何牌就获得21格挡。碎片化（+1专注）和插入器（+1充能球槽位）是关键成长工具。
strategyEn:
Stack Focus with Defragment and Consume.
Channel Frost Orbs with Glacier, Cold Snap, Cool Headed.
Inserter adds Orb slots for more passive Block.
Use Lightning Orbs for passive damage.
Dark Orb for burst damage finisher.
strategyZh:
用碎片化和消耗叠加专注。
用冰川、寒流、冷静引导冰霜充能球。
插入器增加充能球槽位获得更多被动格挡。
用闪电充能球提供被动伤害。
暗黑充能球作为爆发伤害终结。
strengthsEn:
Incredibly safe — passive Block every turn
Scales well into late game
Once set up, almost impossible to die
Works well with many Defect relics
Can add Lightning/Dark Orbs for damage
strengthsZh:
极其安全——每回合被动格挡
后期成长性好
铺垫完成后几乎不可能死亡
与许多故障机器人遗物配合良好
可以加入闪电/暗黑充能球提供伤害
weaknessesEn:
Slow damage output
Needs time to set up Focus and Orbs
Can time out on some boss fights
Vulnerable to Orb-removing effects
weaknessesZh:
伤害输出较慢
需要时间铺垫专注和充能球
某些Boss战可能超时
对移除充能球的效果较脆弱
keyRelicsEn:
Calipers: Carry Block between turns
Inserter: +1 Orb slot every 2 turns
Data Disk: Start with +1 Focus
Mummified Hand: 0-cost Power on Power play
keyRelicsZh:
卡尺：回合间保留格挡
插入器：每2回合+1充能球槽位
数据盘：开局+1专注
木乃伊之手：打出能力时获得0费能力
tipsEn:
Defragment is the #1 priority — each Focus point multiplies ALL Orbs
Glacier channels 2 Frost + gives Block — best Frost card
Cool Headed draws cards while channeling Frost — great cycle
Consume removes an Orb slot but gives +2 Focus — worth it late game
Add 1-2 Lightning or Dark Orb cards for damage
tipsZh:
碎片化是第一优先级——每点专注倍增所有充能球
冰川引导2个冰霜+给予格挡——最好的冰霜卡
冷静在引导冰霜的同时抽牌——优秀循环
消耗移除一个充能球槽位但给予+2专注——后期值得
加入1-2张闪电或暗黑充能球卡提供伤害

summaryEn: Focus on buffing Osty (the giant skeletal hand companion) as your primary damage dealer and shield. An aggressive pet-based build that lets Osty do the heavy lifting.
summaryZh: 专注于增强Osty（巨型骷髅手伙伴）作为你的主要伤害输出和护盾。一个激进的宠物流卡组，让Osty承担主要战斗。
coreMechanicEn: Osty is the Necrobinder unique companion — a giant skeletal hand that fights alongside you. He starts at 1 HP each combat but can be buffed with Symbiosis, Bodyguard, and other cards. A fully buffed Osty can deal massive damage and absorb hits, essentially fighting the battle for you.
coreMechanicZh: Osty是缚灵者的独特伙伴——一只与你并肩作战的巨型骷髅手。他每场战斗从1生命开始，但可以通过共生、保镖等卡牌增强。完全增强的Osty可以造成大量伤害并吸收攻击，本质上替你战斗。
strategyEn:
Buff Osty stats every turn with Symbiosis and attack buffs.
Use Bodyguard to keep Osty alive.
Direct Osty at priority targets.
Keep some Doom cards for high-HP enemies that Osty cannot burst.
Manage your own HP carefully — you are fragile.
strategyZh:
每回合用共生和攻击增益增强Osty的属性。
使用保镖让Osty存活。
将Osty指向优先目标。
保留一些末日卡对付Osty无法爆发的高血量敌人。
谨慎管理自身生命值——你很脆弱。
strengthsEn:
Osty can deal massive damage while you focus on defense
Pet absorbs hits, protecting the Necrobinder
Aggressive playstyle with fast kills
Fun and unique gameplay experience
Can combine with Doom for hybrid approach
strengthsZh:
Osty可以造成大量伤害，你专注防御
宠物吸收攻击，保护缚灵者
激进的游戏风格，快速击杀
有趣且独特的游戏体验
可以与末日结合形成混合打法
weaknessesEn:
Osty starts at 1 HP — needs immediate buffing
If Osty dies, you lose your damage source
Requires specific buff cards to function
Necrobinder is very fragile without Osty tanking
weaknessesZh:
Osty从1生命开始——需要立即增强
如果Osty死亡，你失去伤害来源
需要特定增益卡才能运作
没有Osty坦克时缚灵者非常脆弱
keyRelicsEn:
Relics that buff companions/minions
Healing relics for sustain
Block-generating relics for safety
keyRelicsZh:
增强伙伴/仆从的遗物
治疗遗物用于续航
生成格挡的遗物保安全
tipsEn:
Always buff Osty on turn 1 — he is useless at 1 HP
Symbiosis is the #1 priority card for this build
Keep 2-3 Doom cards as backup for high-HP enemies
Osty can target specific enemies — direct him wisely
This build pairs well with Doom as a hybrid
tipsZh:
第一回合一定要增强Osty——1生命的他毫无用处
共生是这个卡组的第一优先级卡牌
保留2-3张末日卡作为高血量敌人的后备
Osty可以指定目标——明智地指挥他
这个卡组与末日混合搭配效果很好

summaryEn: Play Forge cards to create and upgrade the Sovereign Blade — a powerful 2-cost weapon with Retain that grows stronger throughout the fight.
summaryZh: 打出锻造卡来创建和升级至尊之刃——一把强力的2费武器，带有保留效果且在战斗中不断变强。
coreMechanicEn: Forge cards create or upgrade the Sovereign Blade, a special 2-Energy Attack card with Retain (stays in hand between turns). Each Forge card adds damage, effects, or keywords to the Blade. Once fully forged, a single Blade strike can deal 50+ damage.
coreMechanicZh: 锻造卡创建或升级至尊之刃，一张特殊的2能量攻击卡，带有保留效果（在回合间保留在手中）。每张锻造卡为之刃增加伤害、效果或关键词。完全锻造后，一次之刃打击可造成50+伤害。
strategyEn:
Play Forge cards to build up the Sovereign Blade.
The Blade has Retain — no rush to use it immediately.
Keep forging while playing defense cards.
Use the Blade when it is strong enough to one-shot enemies.
Some Forge cards also need Stars — hybrid with Stars build.
strategyZh:
打出锻造卡来构建至尊之刃。
之刃有保留效果——不急着立即使用。
在打防御卡的同时继续锻造。
当之刃足够强大时使用它一击必杀。
部分锻造卡也需要星辰——可以与星辰流混合。
strengthsEn:
Sovereign Blade can deal massive single-target damage
Blade has Retain — build it over multiple turns
Very satisfying one-shot gameplay
Can combine with Stars for hybrid approach
Blade keeps getting stronger each forge
strengthsZh:
至尊之刃可以造成大量单体伤害
之刃有保留效果——可以多回合构建
一击必杀的游戏体验非常爽快
可以与星辰结合形成混合打法
每次锻造之刃都会变强
weaknessesEn:
Fewer support cards than Stars build
Some Forge cards need Stars too
Weak against multiple enemies (single target focus)
Needs time to forge — vulnerable during setup
Less versatile than Stars build
weaknessesZh:
辅助卡比星辰流少
部分锻造卡也需要星辰
对多个敌人较弱（单体聚焦）
需要时间锻造——铺垫期脆弱
不如星辰流多功能
keyRelicsEn:
Relics that provide extra Energy for forging
Block relics for surviving setup phase
Star-generating relics if using hybrid approach
keyRelicsZh:
提供额外能量用于锻造的遗物
格挡遗物用于度过铺垫阶段
如果使用混合打法则需要星辰生成遗物
tipsEn:
Wrought in War and Spoils of Battle are the best Forge cards
Add Forge cards to supplement a Stars base — do not go pure Forge
Furnace provides ongoing Blade upgrades
Seeking Edge makes the Blade more consistent
Bulwark provides defense while you forge
tipsZh:
战火锻造和战利品是最好的锻造卡
将锻造卡加入星辰基础中——不要纯锻造
熔炉提供持续的之刃升级
寻锋让之刃更稳定
壁垒在你锻造时提供防御

summaryEn: Sacrifice HP to gain powerful effects. Offering draws cards, Brutality draws every turn, and Rupture gains Strength when you lose HP from cards. High risk, high reward.
summaryZh: 牺牲生命值获得强力效果。祭品抽牌，残暴每回合抽牌，裂伤在卡牌扣血时获得力量。高风险，高回报。
coreMechanicEn: Several Ironclad cards cost HP instead of or in addition to Energy. Rupture gives +1 Strength every time you lose HP from a card. Brutality draws 1 card per turn but costs 1 HP. Offering loses 6 HP but gains 2 Energy and draws 3 cards. The Ironclad heals 6 HP after every combat, making HP a renewable resource.
coreMechanicZh: 多张铁甲战士卡牌消耗生命值而非或额外消耗能量。裂伤在每次卡牌扣血时给+1力量。残暴每回合抽1牌但消耗1生命。祭品失去6生命但获得2能量和抽3牌。铁甲战士每场战斗后恢复6生命，使生命值成为可再生资源。
strategyEn:
Play Rupture early to convert HP loss into Strength.
Brutality provides consistent card draw.
Offering is a burst draw + Energy card.
Combat heals 6 HP — use it aggressively.
Pair with Strength cards for double scaling.
strategyZh:
尽早打出裂伤将生命损失转化为力量。
残暴提供稳定抽牌。
祭品是爆发抽牌+能量卡。
战斗后恢复6生命——积极使用。
配合力量卡双重成长。
strengthsEn:
Very fast scaling with Rupture
Excellent card draw from Brutality and Offering
Ironclad heals 6 HP per combat — sustain built in
Can combine with Strength build for maximum damage
High-risk playstyle is exciting and rewarding
strengthsZh:
裂伤快速成长
残暴和祭品提供出色抽牌
铁甲战士每场战斗恢复6生命——内置续航
可以与力量流结合最大化伤害
高风险游戏风格刺激且有回报
weaknessesEn:
Losing HP is dangerous — can die to bad luck
Needs healing relics for sustain
Rupture is useless without self-damage cards
Hard to play in high-Ascension runs
weaknessesZh:
失去生命值很危险——可能因运气差死亡
需要治疗遗物续航
没有自伤卡裂伤毫无用处
高升阶难度下难以运作
keyRelicsEn:
Burning Blood: Heal 6 HP after combat (starter relic)
Self-Forming Clay: Gain 3 Block when losing HP
Red Skull: +3 Strength when below 50% HP
Rupert: Heal when Exhausting cards
keyRelicsZh:
燃烧之血：战斗后恢复6生命（初始遗物）
自塑黏土：失去生命时获得3格挡
红色头骨：低于50%生命时+3力量
鲁伯特：消耗卡牌时治疗
tipsEn:
Rupture + Brutality = +1 Strength every turn passively
Offering is one of the best cards in the game — always take it
Do not go below 30% HP without healing available
Combine with Demon Form for double Strength scaling
Hemo is great — deals damage and triggers Rupture
tipsZh:
裂伤+残暴=每回合被动+1力量
祭品是游戏中最好的卡之一——遇到必拿
没有治疗时不要让生命低于30%
配合恶魔形态双重力量成长
放血很好——造成伤害并触发裂伤
